query:
SELECT s.id, s.name, sa.id as saleId, sa.vehicleModel, sa.competitionId, sa.status 
FROM sales sa JOIN sellers s ON s.id = sa.sellerId 
WHERE sa.competitionId IS NULL AND sa.status = 'approved'
ORDER BY s.name
